summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Konekte AI Recruiter Agent - all core features working correctly. Backend APIs fully functional with real OpenAI integration. Frontend UI/UX working with minor clipboard permission issue in automated testing.

design_issues.issue: Clipboard write permission denied during automated testing
design_issues.impact: Copy buttons work in manual testing but fail in automated browser testing due to security restrictions
design_issues.note: This is a browser security limitation, not an application bug

passed_tests: GET /api/ root endpoint returns correct message
GET /api/leads returns empty array initially
GET /api/leads/stats returns correct initial stats
POST /api/analyze-profile creates lead with AI analysis and generated message
GET /api/leads returns created lead after analysis
GET /api/leads/stats returns updated stats after lead creation
PATCH /api/leads/{id}/status updates lead status to contacted and replied
POST /api/leads/{id}/regenerate-message regenerates message successfully
DELETE /api/leads/{id} deletes lead successfully
API filtering by status, platform, and score range works
Frontend Dashboard page loads with stats cards and leads table
Frontend Analyze page loads with profile form
Frontend sidebar navigation works between Dashboard and Analyze pages
Frontend profile analysis form submission works and shows results
Frontend leads table shows leads with correct data
Frontend filters (status and platform) work in leads table
Frontend message dialog opens when clicking message icon
Frontend message regeneration works
Frontend status change works via dropdown menu
Frontend score sorting functionality works
Dark AI theme properly applied throughout application
Framer Motion animations working correctly
Shadcn UI components rendering properly
